note: random σ per half = interleaved diff / sqrt(2); timehalf excess over interleaved = the structured (drift-phase) component; halfstack_total_bgnoise is the same half's whole-image bgnoise (structure INCLUDED) for the floor comparison. 32-bit chain; inputs are 16-bit sub-stacks (quantization σ 0.29/sqrt(members/2) per half, declared).
